title: BSN and BSSN Strengthen Synergy to Prepare Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography Algorithms
summary: Official news from Indonesia's National Standardization Agency (BSN) reporting joint work with BSSN to prepare migration to post-quantum cryptography algorithms, including standardization support and conformity assessment for the PQC transition.

title: BSSN Technical Guidance on Implementing Indonesian Cryptographic Algorithms, including Introduction to Post-Quantum Cryptography (v1.0)
summary: Account of BSSN technical guidance for implementing Indonesian cryptographic algorithms and BSSN's 'Pengenalan Post-Quantum Cryptography' (Introduction to Post-Quantum Cryptography) v1.0, prepared as input for stakeholders' anticipatory steps on PQC migration. Hosted on a non-government site, so flagged for review pending an official BSSN URL.

title: BSSN Holds FGD on Policy and Implementation of Indonesian Cryptographic Algorithms (Post-Quantum Cryptography)
summary: Report on a BSSN focus-group discussion on the policy and implementation of Indonesian cryptographic algorithms that addresses post-quantum cryptography. Published by the Makassar city government CSIRT (local-government republisher), so flagged for review.

title: JakTek Series 2: Developments in Post-Quantum Cryptography and SNI ISO Standards
summary: Post on developments in post-quantum cryptography and related SNI ISO standards in Indonesia, published by the Makassar city government CSIRT reporting on national cryptographic-policy activity. Local-government republisher, so flagged for review.
